title: corrupted_worlds.jar [Horror]
body: ![corrupted_worlds](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_bd97a0f0-640d-4c83-b562-862740937bce.png) **Wh3r3 1m I?..** A small horror mod that adds scary (maybe) liminal dimensions into your minecraft world. It was inspired by _SixAlphaSix.jar_ and _Wonderland.jar._ (But that doesn't mean I stole the content from there.) This mod adds: - 14 dimensions - 11 entities - 10 random events - 9 structures that spawn in Overworld Mod is still in development, so it is very buggy now, and some dimensions may look incomplete. **IF YOU FOUND A BUG PLEASE WRITE ON** **artmsrd1337@gmail.com**. **SOME WARNINGS:** 1. This mod **CAN** interact with your PC a little (for example show system notifications). 2. This mod **CAN** change game settings (for example change render distance). 3. This mod **CONTAINS** loud sounds. **VIDEOS ABOUT MOD:**
